title: Arab teams at 2026 World Cup: Qatar suffer tough 6-0 loss to Canada

snapshot.title: Arab teams at 2026 World Cup: Qatar suffer tough 6-0 loss to Canada
snapshot.description: LOS ANGELES: Canada thrashed nine-man Qatar 6-0 to secure their first ever World Cup victory on Thursday as Switzerland reignited their campaign with a resounding defeat of Bosnia-Herzegovina. Tournament co-hosts Canada had lost all six of their previous matches at the World Cup, at the 1986 and 2022 finals, but brought that run of losses to a halt in spectacular fashion at
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Arab teams at 2026 World Cup: Qatar suffer tough 6-0 loss to Canada | Arab News
